reference: Hello, it could be due to an abdominal or spinal cause. Please get an ultrasound of the abdomen and pelvis, a kidney, ureter, and bladder X-ray, a urine examination, and a lumbar spine X-ray as preliminary examinations.
text: Hello, it could be due to an abdominal or spinal cause. Please get an ultrasound of the abdomen and pelvis, a kidney, ureter, and bladder X-ray, a urine examination, and a lumbar spine X-ray as preliminary examinations.
